caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion on climate crisis poems titled "No More Time" by Greg Delanty. The scene is set up as a split-screen interview, with Margaret Harrington on the left and Greg Delanty on the right. Margaret, who has red hair and is wearing a blue patterned top, is seen gesturing with her hand, possibly emphasizing a point or reacting to something Delanty is saying. Delanty, an older man with white hair, glasses, and a beard, is dressed in a blue shirt and appears to be speaking earnestly, likely discussing his poetry and its relevance to the climate crisis. The background of each participant's setting is different, with Margaret in a room adorned with green string lights and Delanty in a space with a blue wall and a framed picture. The overall tone suggests a serious and thoughtful conversation about environmental issues.
